metadata.name: Update Case Calendar with New Date

description: A deposition has been rescheduled. A paralegal needs to update the case calendar.

nodes.task_description: Locate the existing calendar entry for the deposition.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the correct event on the calendar.

nodes.task_description: Update the entry with the new date and time.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully changes the date of the event.

nodes.task_description: Ensure all original attendees are still on the invitation and send an update notification.

expected_outcome.expected: All parties are notified of the new schedule.
